title: Quick Tree Chopper
description: Tree Chopper mods allows a way for you to chop trees without deforesting the surrounding land.
body:
Quick Tree Chopper allows for the player instantly chop down trees. Instead of going out and chopping down trees you can have one in your base.

To craft this item you need a diamond axe, three iron ingots, a redstone block, two pistons, and two hoppers. 

You need bonemel and sapplings for this to work without either you wont get wood. You can get anywhere from 4-6 pieces of wood and it uses 1 sapling and 1-3 pieces of bonemeal. 

The output only allows for a stack after that you need to remove the wood to contiue using it.

Which axe you put it lasts as long as it durability. Ex: Iron axe last for 250 uses.

Different saplings require different axes:

wood/stone - oak 
iron - oak and spruce 
gold - oak,spruce,dark oak
diamond - oak,spruce,dark oak, birch, jungle, acacia
netherite - oak,spruce,dark oak, birch, jungle, acacia, cherry blossom, mangrove, pale oak
